product: AI Gateway is now generally available
tagline: Mosaic AI Gateway is now generally available.
what_it_does: Mosaic AI Gateway is now generally available. AI Gateway is a centralized service that streamlines the usage and management of generative AI models within an organization. AI Gateway brings governance, monitoring, and production readiness to model serving endpoints using the following features: Permission and rate limiting to control who has access and how much access.
why_it_matters: AI Gateway brings governance, monitoring, and production readiness to model serving endpoints using the following features: Permission and rate limiting to control who has access and how much access.
plain_summary: Mosaic AI Gateway is now generally available. AI Gateway is a centralized service that streamlines the usage and management of generative AI models within an organization.

capabilities.title: An end-to-end path for administrators
capabilities.desc: An end-to-end path for administrators to govern access to AI assets, traffic and cost, and the content of requests and responses.

capabilities.desc: Tutorial: Govern a coding agent's GitHub MCP access

capabilities.title: Restrict a coding agent's access
capabilities.desc: Restrict a coding agent's access to GitHub MCP tools using Unity Catalog permissions and a built-in service policy.
